title: Open the app and navigate to the French phrases section
preconditions: The app is installed and running
test_steps: Open the Language Learning App | Navigate to the French phrases section
expected_result: The French phrases section is displayed

title: Search for a specific phrase
preconditions: The app is open and on the French phrases section
test_steps: Click on the search icon in the header | Enter 'traffic lights' in the search bar | Press the search button
expected_result: The search results for 'traffic lights' are displayed

title: Select a category
preconditions: The app is open and on the French phrases section
test_steps: Click on the 'Common' category in the list rows
expected_result: The 'Common' category is selected and displayed

title: Click on a suggestion
preconditions: The app is open and on the French phrases section
test_steps: Click on the 'feux' suggestion in the 'Suggestion' section

title: Click on a list row
preconditions: The app is open and on the French phrases section
test_steps: Click on the 'Emergency' category in the list rows
expected_result: The 'Emergency' category is selected and displayed

title: Click on the menu icon
preconditions: The app is open and on the French phrases section
test_steps: Click on the menu icon in the header
expected_result: The menu is opened and displayed

title: Click on the favorites icon
preconditions: The app is open and on the French phrases section
test_steps: Click on the favorites icon in the header
expected_result: The favorites section is opened and displayed

title: Click on the settings icon
preconditions: The app is open and on the French phrases section
test_steps: Click on the settings icon in the header
expected_result: The settings menu is opened and displayed

title: Click on a checkbox
preconditions: The app is open and on the French phrases section
test_steps: Click on the checkbox next to the 'Common' category in the list rows

title: Click on a toggle button
preconditions: The app is open and on the French phrases section
test_steps: Click on the toggle button next to the 'Common' category in the list rows
expected_result: The toggle button for 'Common' is toggled
